ground_truth_requirements.text: Use Case: xxx Page, UC ID: UC_RR_xxx_xxx_000 Action: Create/Add User A user with admin privileges shall be able to Add/Create a new user and associate the user with specified role(s) in the system.

ground_truth_requirements.text: The system shall display an error message if the new user is found in the [system name] system.

ground_truth_requirements.text: The system shall display an error message if the new user is not active in the Active Directory.

ground_truth_requirements.text: The system shall display the xxx tab as the default tab.

ground_truth_requirements.text: The user shall be able to create/add a new user manually or from a template.

ground_truth_requirements.text: The user record shall inherit all specified role(s) settings in the template when the user record is created from the user template The user shall be able to add additional roles manually while creating/adding a new user from a user template.

ground_truth_requirements.text: The system shall perform a search on the [system name] user display name and user name columns in the user tables to find the user and verify the user’s existence.

ground_truth_requirements.text: The system shall perform a search in the Active Directory to verify the status of the user — Active/Inactive within the company—when the user attempts to create/add a new user in the [system name] system.

ground_truth_requirements.text: Usability User Interface Guidelines The Project Team must demonstrate mockups of UI changes to project stakeholders early in the development process.
ground_truth_requirements.normalized_text: usability user interface guidelines the project team must demonstrate mockups of ui changes to project stakeholders early in the development process

ground_truth_requirements.text: The Project Team must permit reasonable adjustment to the user interfaces of new functionality by project stakeholders when project schedule permits those adjustments.
ground_truth_requirements.normalized_text: the project team must permit reasonable adjustment to the user interfaces of new functionality by project stakeholders when project schedule permits those adjustments

ground_truth_requirements.text: Reliability System Downtime The Project Team shall schedule updates to the production environment only on Tuesdays between 7pm and 7am.
ground_truth_requirements.normalized_text: reliability system downtime the project team shall schedule updates to the production environment only on tuesdays between 7pm and 7am

ground_truth_requirements.text: (Example) Performance Quality Assurance The Project Team must perform applicable and appropriate testing against new functionality prior to releasing that functionality/build to the production environment.
ground_truth_requirements.normalized_text: example performance quality assurance the project team must perform applicable and appropriate testing against new functionality prior to releasing that functionality build to the production environment

ground_truth_requirements.text: The project Team must allow a reasonable time to conduct User Acceptance Testing (UAT) against the built functionalities prior to deploying the product to the production environment.
ground_truth_requirements.normalized_text: the project team must allow a reasonable time to conduct user acceptance testing uat against the built functionalities prior to deploying the product to the production environment

ground_truth_requirements.text: Supportability Coding Standards The Development Team shall define coding standards for the application and follow those standards consistently.
ground_truth_requirements.normalized_text: supportability coding standards the development team shall define coding standards for the application and follow those standards consistently

ground_truth_requirements.text: The Development Team shall be required to adjust existing source code to follow accepted coding standards only if that source code must be modified.
ground_truth_requirements.normalized_text: the development team shall be required to adjust existing source code to follow accepted coding standards only if that source code must be modified

ground_truth_requirements.text: The Development Team shall be required to adjust existing source code to use the external log file only if that source code must be modified to implement another requirement.
ground_truth_requirements.normalized_text: the development team shall be required to adjust existing source code to use the external log file only if that source code must be modified to implement another requirement
